description: The FeedQuantityFieldInterface component is used as a template type item in data feed mappers in the Data Feeds system.

fields.Value: The field to write to and read the value from the source data feed item for this template.
fields.Formatting: The field to populate with the format string that should be used when displaying the value.
fields.Min: The field to fill with the minimum value this quantity can be.
fields.Max: The field to fill with the maximum value this quantity can be.
fields.DefaultUnit: The field to fill with the denoter for the default unit for this quantity type.
fields.FormatUnit: Usually points to the FormatUnit on a QuantityTextFormatDriver.
fields.FormatNumber: Usually points to the FormatNumber on a QuantityTextFormatDriver.
fields.CompoundFormatUnits: Usually points to the CompoundFormatUnits on a QuantityTextFormatDriver.
fields.CompoundOverrideNames: Usually points to the CompoundOverrideNames on a QuantityTextFormatDriver.
fields.CompoundUseLongNames: Usually points to the CompoundUseLongNames on a QuantityTextFormatDriver.
fields.CompoundSeparator: Usually points to the CompoundSeparator on a QuantityTextFormatDriver.
